subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou by Whose Name the Self-Subsisting arose, and the seal of the choice Wine was broken, and all hastened unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من باسمک قام القیوم و فک ختم الرحیق المختوم و سرع الیک کل من
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @prayer for nearness to God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
